local-context-fetcher.description: Mock MCP server integration pulling institutional policies and specific local constraints to ground assignments.

predictability-scorer.description: Programmatically calculates the predictability score of an assignment based on format standardity and context availability.

mermaid-baseline-generator.description: Spins up baseline visual frameworks (as code) that students will be required to modify and defend.

constraint-auditor.description: Crawls generated assignments and flags any deliverable that looks like an unverified text document.

mock-payload-updater.description: Updates the local context mock payload with new institutional data.

workspace-resetter.description: Clears the output directory to prepare the workspace for a fresh pipeline run.
